resources.string: Early alert = optional long-range heads-up. Approach alert = warning before the turn. At-turn alert = beep right at the turn. Each can be switched on/off separately. If the next turn is already closer than a threshold when it comes up, that threshold is skipped instead of beeping late.
Meters: the alert fires when the distance to the next turn drops below this value.
Hz slider: tone pitch. Lower = softer, higher = sharper.
ms: length of a single beep.
Tone: single/double/triple beeps, or rising/falling two-tone. Custom lets you enter your own sequence as Hz:ms pairs separated by commas, 0:ms inserts a pause.
Beeps are timed using your current speed, so they land right on the configured distance.
Enabled: master switch for all alerts.
In-ride only: alerts only while a ride is being recorded.
Wake up screen: turns the display on when an alert fires.
Important: disable the stock TBT sound under Profiles → Audio Alerts → Turn By Turn, otherwise you will hear both.
